sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103212" key="*teryi/xoros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Τερψῐ´-χορος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n103212.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">enjoying the dance</tr_>, esp. the choral dance, of Apollo, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.525.20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
